We also know that f(2, 0) = 2 from the first property. So, f(4, 2) = (1/2) * 2 = 1. Now we can work our way back up: f(10, 4) = (4/10) * 1 = 2/5. f(14, 10) = (10/14) * (2/5) = 2/7.
